creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 239338
Patch for devel/libspice-server

The attached patch for configure.ac fixes the following issues:

- Eliminate dependency on the old autoconf-arvchive.
- Remove "openssl" in spice-server.pc.in.  This prevented the library checking from working because OpenSSL in the base system does not use pkgconfig.
